subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned with thy spirit, heart and innermost being toward the Most Glorious Kingdom in this divine assemblage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه بروحه و قلبه و فواده الی الملکوت الابهی در این انجمن رحمانی و مجمع
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
